hero.title: Flehew!
hero.subtitle: Welcome to Upper Labay High School. Home of the future Cultural Heritage Learning Center, where we strengthen Blaan identity through traditional beadwork and jewelry craftsmanship.

stats_cards.title: Gumnè Fgalad
stats_cards.description: Academic Excellence: A curriculum that blends DepEd standards with deep Indigenous Knowledge (IKSP).

stats_cards.title: Cultural Identity
stats_cards.description: Blaan Heritage: Strengthening our learners' identity through the School of Living Traditions (SLT) and traditional arts.

stats_cards.title: Kaye Dad Tagu
stats_cards.description: Elders' Wisdom: Preserving our Flalok (oral stories) to ensure our ancestral voice guides the next generation.

vision.title: Rooted in Heritage, Growing for the Future
vision.description: Upper Labay High School is more than just an educational institution; it is a sanctuary for the Blaan soul. Our vision is to empower students who are globally competitive yet deeply anchored in their cultural roots.

promo.title: Ready to join Gumnè Fgalad?
promo.description: Start your enrollment journey today and be part of a community that values both tradition and excellence.
